task_completion.description: Log into the FreeScout help desk application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeScout dashboard or mailbox interface is visible in the web browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'IT Infrastructure Support' mailbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'IT Infrastructure Support' mailbox is selected or displayed as the active mailbox in the FreeScout interface.

task_completion.description: Open the 'Deleted' folder within the mailbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Deleted' folder is highlighted or selected in the left sidebar navigation.
The conversation with the subject 'Cisco 2960X Switch Replacement - Building C Floor 3' is visible in the list of deleted conversations or is actively opened on the screen.

task_completion.description: Restore the conversation so it appears in the normal active conversation list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The conversation 'Cisco 2960X Switch Replacement - Building C Floor 3' is visible in an active folder (such as 'Unassigned', 'Mine', or the main mailbox view) OR a success toast/message indicating the conversation was restored is visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the FreeScout web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the FreeScout GUI, mouse clicks, or navigation through the web interface.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual FreeScout application hosted at the specified URL.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'localhost:8080' (or the relevant local IP/port) and not a local file path or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not fake the restoration by simply editing the HTML DOM.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface looks like standard FreeScout without browser developer tools open or artificially injected text overlays.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Subject: 'Cisco 2960X Switch Replacement - Building C Floor 3'. Mailbox: 'IT Infrastructure Support'. Customer Email: 'mchen@acmecorp.net'.
